verses.latin_vulgate: Benjamin autem genuit Bale primogenitum suum, Asbel secundum, Ahara tertium,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבִ֨נְיָמִ֔ן הוֹלִ֖יד אֶת־בֶּ֣לַע בְּכֹר֑וֹ אַשְׁבֵּל֙ הַשֵּׁנִ֔י וְאַחְרַ֖ח הַשְּׁלִישִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: Now Benjamin begat Bela his firstborn, Ashbel the second, and Aharah the third,

verses.latin_vulgate: Nohaa quartum, et Rapha quintum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נוֹחָה֙ הָרְבִיעִ֔י וְרָפָ֖א הַחֲמִישִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: Nohah the fourth, and Rapha the fifth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fueruntque filii Bale : Addar, et Gera, et Abiud,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּהְי֥וּ בָנִ֖ים לְבָ֑לַע אַדָּ֥ר וְגֵרָ֖א וַאֲבִיהֽוּד׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Bela were, Addar, and Gera, and Abihud,

verses.latin_vulgate: Abisue quoque et Naaman, et Ahoë,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲבִישׁ֥וּעַ וְנַעֲמָ֖ן וַאֲחֽוֹחַ׃
verses.king_james: And Abishua, and Naaman, and Ahoah,

verses.latin_vulgate: sed et Gera, et Sephuphan, et Huram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגֵרָ֥א וּשְׁפוּפָ֖ן וְחוּרָֽם׃
verses.king_james: And Gera, and Shephuphan, and Huram.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi sunt filii Ahod, principes cognationum habitantium in Gabaa, qui translati sunt in Manahath.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֣י אֵח֑וּד אֵ֣לֶּה הֵ֞ם רָאשֵׁ֤י אָבוֹת֙ לְי֣וֹשְׁבֵי גֶ֔בַע וַיַּגְל֖וּם אֶל־מָנָֽחַת׃
verses.king_james: And these are the sons of Ehud: these are the heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Geba, and they removed them to Manahath:

verses.latin_vulgate: Naaman autem, et Achia, et Gera, ipse transtulit eos, et genuit Osa, et Ahiud.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנַעֲמָ֧ן וַאֲחִיָּ֛ה וְגֵרָ֖א ה֣וּא הֶגְלָ֑ם וְהוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־עֻזָּ֖א וְאֶת־אֲחִיחֻֽד׃
verses.king_james: And Naaman, and Ahiah, and Gera, he removed them, and begat Uzza, and Ahihud.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Saharaim genuit in regione Moab, postquam dimisit Husim et Bara uxores suas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׁחֲרַ֗יִם הוֹלִיד֙ בִּשְׂדֵ֣ה מוֹאָ֔ב מִן־שִׁלְח֖וֹ אֹתָ֑ם חוּשִׁ֥ים וְאֶֽת־בַּעֲרָ֖א נָשָֽׁיו׃
verses.king_james: And Shaharaim begat children in the country of Moab, after he had sent them away; Hushim and Baara were his wives.

verses.latin_vulgate: Genuit autem de Hodes uxore sua Jobab, et Sebia, et Mosa, et Molchom,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיּ֖וֹלֶד מִן־חֹ֣דֶשׁ אִשְׁתּ֑וֹ אֶת־יוֹבָב֙ וְאֶת־צִבְיָ֔א וְאֶת־מֵישָׁ֖א וְאֶת־מַלְכָּֽם׃
verses.king_james: And he begat of Hodesh his wife, Jobab, and Zibia, and Mesha, and Malcham,

verses.latin_vulgate: Jehus quoque, et Sechia, et Marma : hi sunt filii ejus principes in familiis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־יְע֥וּץ וְאֶת־שָֽׂכְיָ֖ה וְאֶת־מִרְמָ֑ה אֵ֥לֶּה בָנָ֖יו רָאשֵׁ֥י אָבֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: And Jeuz, and Shachia, and Mirma. These were his sons, heads of the fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mehusim vero genuit Abitob et Elphaal.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמֵחֻשִׁ֛ים הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־אֲבִיט֖וּב וְאֶת־אֶלְפָּֽעַל׃
verses.king_james: And of Hushim he begat Abitub, and Elpaal.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro filii Elphaal : Heber, et Misaam, et Samad : hic ædificavit Ono, et Lod, et filias ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י אֶלְפַּ֔עַל עֵ֥בֶר וּמִשְׁעָ֖ם וָשָׁ֑מֶד ה֚וּא בָּנָ֣ה אֶת־אוֹנ֔וֹ וְאֶת־לֹ֖ד וּבְנֹתֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: The sons of Elpaal; Eber, and Misham, and Shamed, who built Ono, and Lod, with the towns thereof:

verses.latin_vulgate: Baria autem et Sama principes cognationum habitantium in Ajalon : hi fugaverunt habitatores Geth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְרִעָ֣ה וָשֶׁ֔מַע הֵ֚מָּה רָאשֵׁ֣י הָאָב֔וֹת לְיוֹשְׁבֵ֖י אַיָּל֑וֹן הֵ֥מָּה הִבְרִ֖יחוּ אֶת־י֥וֹשְׁבֵי גַֽת׃
verses.king_james: Beriah also, and Shema, who were heads of the fathers of the inhabitants of Aijalon, who drove away the inhabitants of Gath:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Ahio, et Sesac, et Jerimoth,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחְי֥וֹ שָׁשָׁ֖ק וִירֵמֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: And Ahio, Shashak, and Jeremoth,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Zabadia, et Arod, et Heder,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּזְבַדְיָ֥ה וַעֲרָ֖ד וָעָֽדֶר׃
verses.king_james: And Zebadiah, and Arad, and Ader,

verses.latin_vulgate: Michaël quoque, et Jespha, et Joha filii Baria.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִיכָאֵ֧ל וְיִשְׁפָּ֛ה וְיוֹחָ֖א בְּנֵ֥י בְרִיעָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And Michael, and Ispah, and Joha, the sons of Beriah;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Zabadia, et Mosollam, et Hezeci, et Heber,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּזְבַדְיָ֥ה וּמְשֻׁלָּ֖ם וְחִזְקִ֥י וָחָֽבֶר׃
verses.king_james: And Zebadiah, and Meshullam, and Hezeki, and Heber,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Jesamari, et Jezlia, et Jobab filii Elphaal,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִשְׁמְרַ֧י וְיִזְלִיאָ֛ה וְיוֹבָ֖ב בְּנֵ֥י אֶלְפָּֽעַל׃
verses.king_james: Ishmerai also, and Jezliah, and Jobab, the sons of Elpaal;

verses.latin_vulgate: et Jacim, et Zechri, et Zabdi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָקִ֥ים וְזִכְרִ֖י וְזַבְדִּֽי׃
verses.king_james: And Jakim, and Zichri, and Zabdi,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Elioënai, et Selethai, et Eliel,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וֶאֱלִיעֵינַ֥י וְצִלְּתַ֖י וֶאֱלִיאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: And Elienai, and Zilthai, and Eliel,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Adaia, et Baraia, et Samarath, filii Semei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַעֲדָיָ֧ה וּבְרָאיָ֛ה וְשִׁמְרָ֖ת בְּנֵ֥י שִׁמְעִֽי׃
verses.king_james: And Adaiah, and Beraiah, and Shimrath, the sons of Shimhi;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Jespham, et Heber, et Eliel,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִשְׁפָּ֥ן וָעֵ֖בֶר וֶאֱלִיאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: And Ishpan, and Heber, and Eliel,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Abdon, et Zechri, et Hanan,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַבְדּ֥וֹן וְזִכְרִ֖י וְחָנָֽן׃
verses.king_james: And Abdon, and Zichri, and Hanan,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Hanania, et Ælam, et Anathothia,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַחֲנַנְיָ֥ה וְעֵילָ֖ם וְעַנְתֹתִיָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: And Hananiah, and Elam, and Antothijah,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Jephdaia, et Phanuel, filii Sesac.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִפְדְיָ֥ה (ופניאל) [וּפְנוּאֵ֖ל] בְּנֵ֥י שָׁשָֽׁק׃
verses.king_james: And Iphedeiah, and Penuel, the sons of Shashak;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Samsari, et Sohoria, et Otholia,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׁמְשְׁרַ֥י וּשְׁחַרְיָ֖ה וַעֲתַלְיָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And Shamsherai, and Shehariah, and Athaliah,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Jersia, et Elia, et Zechri, filii Jeroham.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיַעֲרֶשְׁיָ֧ה וְאֵלִיָּ֛ה וְזִכְרִ֖י בְּנֵ֥י יְרֹחָֽם׃
verses.king_james: And Jaresiah, and Eliah, and Zichri, the sons of Jeroham.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi patriarchæ, et cognationum principes, qui habitaverunt in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣לֶּה רָאשֵׁ֥י אָב֛וֹת לְתֹלְדוֹתָ֖ם רָאשִׁ֑ים אֵ֖לֶּה יָשְׁב֥וּ בִירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.king_james: These were heads of the fathers, by their generations, chief men. These dwelt in Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: In Gabaon autem habitaverunt Abigabaon, et nomen uxoris ejus Maacha :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְגִבְע֥וֹן יָשְׁב֖וּ אֲבִ֣י גִבְע֑וֹן וְשֵׁ֥ם אִשְׁתּ֖וֹ מַעֲכָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And at Gibeon dwelt the father of Gibeon; whose wife’s name was Maachah:

verses.latin_vulgate: filiusque ejus primogenitus Abdon, et Sur, et Cis, et Baal, et Nadab,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנ֥וֹ הַבְּכ֖וֹר עַבְדּ֑וֹן וְצ֥וּר וְקִ֖ישׁ וּבַ֥עַל וְנָדָֽב׃
verses.king_james: And his firstborn son Abdon, and Zur, and Kish, and Baal, and Nadab,

verses.latin_vulgate: Gedor quoque, et Ahio, et Zacher, et Macelloth :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּגְד֥וֹר וְאַחְי֖וֹ וָזָֽכֶר׃
verses.king_james: And Gedor, and Ahio, and Zacher.

verses.latin_vulgate: et Macelloth genuit Samaa : habitaveruntque ex adverso fratrum suorum in Jerusalem cum fratribus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִקְל֖וֹת הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־שִׁמְאָ֑ה וְאַף־הֵ֗מָּה נֶ֧גֶד אֲחֵיהֶ֛ם יָשְׁב֥וּ בִירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם עִם־אֲחֵיהֶֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And Mikloth begat Shimeah. And these also dwelt with their brethren in Jerusalem, over against them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ner autem genuit Cis, et Cis genuit Saul. Porro Saul genuit Jonathan, et Melchisua, et Abinadab, et Esbaal.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנֵר֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־קִ֔ישׁ וְקִ֖ישׁ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־שָׁא֑וּל וְשָׁא֗וּל הוֹלִ֤יד אֶת־יְהֽוֹנָתָן֙ וְאֶת־מַלְכִּישׁ֔וּעַ וְאֶת־אֲבִינָדָ֖ב וְאֶת־אֶשְׁבָּֽעַל׃
verses.king_james: And Ner begat Kish, and Kish begat Saul, and Saul begat Jonathan, and Malchi–shua, and Abinadab, and Esh–baal.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius autem Jonathan, Meribbaal : et Meribbaal genuit Micha.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֶן־יְהוֹנָתָ֖ן מְרִ֣יב בָּ֑עַל וּמְרִ֥יב בַּ֖עַל הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־מִיכָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And the son of Jonathan was Merib–baal; and Merib–baal begat Micah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Micha, Phithon, et Melech, et Tharaa, et Ahaz.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י מִיכָ֑ה פִּית֥וֹן וָמֶ֖לֶךְ וְתַאְרֵ֥עַ וְאָחָֽז׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Micah were, Pithon, and Melech, and Tarea, and Ahaz.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et Ahaz genuit Joada, et Joada genuit Alamath, et Azmoth, et Zamri : porro Zamri genuit Mosa,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָחָז֙ הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־יְהוֹעַדָּ֔ה וִיהוֹעַדָּ֗ה הוֹלִ֛יד אֶת־עָלֶ֥מֶת וְאֶת־עַזְמָ֖וֶת וְאֶת־זִמְרִ֑י וְזִמְרִ֖י הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־מוֹצָֽא׃
verses.king_james: And Ahaz begat Jehoadah; and Jehoadah begat Alemeth, and Azmaveth, and Zimri; and Zimri begat Moza,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Mosa genuit Banaa, cujus filius fuit Rapha, de quo ortus est Elasa, qui genuit Asel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמוֹצָ֖א הוֹלִ֣יד אֶת־בִּנְעָ֑א רָפָ֥ה בְנ֛וֹ אֶלְעָשָׂ֥ה בְנ֖וֹ אָצֵ֥ל בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And Moza begat Binea: Rapha was his son, Eleasah his son, Azel his son:

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Asel sex filii fuerunt his nominibus : Ezricam, Bocru, Ismahel, Saria, Obdia, et Hanan : omnes hi filii Asel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּלְאָצֵל֮ שִׁשָּׁ֣ה בָנִים֒ וְאֵ֣לֶּה שְׁמוֹתָ֗ם עַזְרִיקָ֥ם ׀ בֹּ֙כְרוּ֙ וְיִשְׁמָעֵ֣אל וּשְׁעַרְיָ֔ה וְעֹבַדְיָ֖ה וְחָנָ֑ן כׇּל־אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י אָצַֽל׃
verses.king_james: And Azel had six sons, whose names are these, Azrikam, Bocheru, and Ishmael, and Sheariah, and Obadiah, and Hanan. All these were the sons of Azel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Esec fratris ejus, Ulam primogenitus, et Jehus secundus, et Eliphalet tertius.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י עֵ֣שֶׁק אָחִ֑יו אוּלָ֣ם בְּכֹר֔וֹ יְעוּשׁ֙ הַשֵּׁנִ֔י וֶאֱלִיפֶ֖לֶט הַשְּׁלִשִֽׁי׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Eshek his brother were, Ulam his firstborn, Jehush the second, and Eliphelet the third.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fueruntque filii Ulam viri robustissimi, et magno robore tendentes arcum : et multos habentes filios ac nepotes, usque ad centum quinquaginta. Omnes hi filii Benjamin.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּהְי֣וּ בְנֵֽי־א֠וּלָ֠ם אֲנָשִׁ֨ים גִּבּוֹרֵי־חַ֜יִל דֹּ֣רְכֵי קֶ֗שֶׁת וּמַרְבִּ֤ים בָּנִים֙ וּבְנֵ֣י בָנִ֔ים מֵאָ֖ה וַחֲמִשִּׁ֑ים כׇּל־אֵ֖לֶּה מִבְּנֵ֥י בִנְיָמִֽן׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And the sons of Ulam were mighty men of valour, archers, and had many sons, and sons’ sons, an hundred and fifty. All these are of the sons of Benjamin.
